_readme: Deterministic scripted troubleshooter. Each topic is a fixed prompt the user taps (no free-text parsing, so nothing here can hallucinate). branches are evaluated in order; the first whose conditions all match against the computed diary-state flags is shown; otherwise fallback is shown. conditions reference flags computed in js/troubleshooter.js from the last valid diary night, never raw free text. One topic (possible_apnea) routes straight to the safety gate instead of returning a branch response: see routesToSafety. This library doubles as the seed seat for the Level 1 golden dataset the DIV application budgets for (structured input-state to known-correct-output pairs). 2026-07-20: the daytime_sleepy_high branch's driving/machinery caution was removed at Ida's direction, since it was new safety content not condensed from any session deck; every response in this file now traces to session-deck content only. (The separate hard-stop safety GATE for daytime sleepiness, in js/engine.js and data/i18n.json's safety block, still names driving/machinery: that mechanism was an explicit original build requirement, not session-deck content, and was left as is pending Ida's confirmation it should also change.)

flags.flagTemperature: last valid night's interference.temperature is true
flags.flagNoise: last valid night's interference.noise is true
flags.flagLight: last valid night's interference.light is true
flags.flagWorrySleep: last valid night's interference.worrySleep is true
flags.flagWorryWork: last valid night's interference.worryWork is true
flags.flagWorryFamily: last valid night's interference.worryFamily is true
flags.anyWorryFlag: true if any of flagWorrySleep/flagWorryWork/flagWorryFamily is true
flags.anyEnvironmentFlag: true if any of flagTemperature/flagNoise/flagLight is true
flags.sleepinessHighOrDangerous: last valid night's sleepiness is 'high' or 'dangerous'
flags.wokeEarlyVsAnchor: last valid night's wakeTime is 30 to 180 minutes before the committed wake-time anchor (state.wakeTime)

response.en: Your diary shows it took a long time to fall asleep, and you marked worry as part of what interfered. Try moving your worry time earlier in the evening: 15 minutes with paper and pen, in a spot that is not your bed, writing down each worry and one small step. Tonight, if a worry returns in bed, you can tell yourself you already dealt with it, and its time is tomorrow. If you are still awake after about 20 minutes, get up, per rule 3, and come back only when sleepy.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha ilichukua muda mrefu kupata usingizi, na uliweka alama kuwa wasiwasi ulikuwa sehemu ya kilichokusumbua. Jaribu kuhamisha muda wako wa kuwaza wasiwasi mapema jioni: dakika 15 na karatasi na kalamu, mahali ambapo si kitandani, ukiandika kila wasiwasi na hatua moja ndogo. Usiku huu, wasiwasi ukirudi ukiwa kitandani, unaweza kujiambia umeshaushughulikia, na wakati wake ni kesho. Ukiwa bado macho baada ya dakika 20 hivi, amka, kulingana na kanuni ya 3, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha ilichukua muda mrefu kupata sleep, na ulimark worry kama part ya kilichokusumbua. Try kuhamisha worry time yako mapema jioni: dakika 15 na karatasi na kalamu, mahali ambayo sio bedani, ukiandika kila worry na hatua moja ndogo. Usiku huu, worry ikirudi ukiwa bedani, unaweza kujiambia umeshaishughulikia, na time yake ni kesho. Ukiwa bado umeamka baada ya dakika 20, toka, kulingana na rule 3, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia.

response.en: Your diary shows it took longer than usual to fall asleep. That happens, especially in the first weeks: the plan is working even when a single night is hard. If you are lying awake for about 20 minutes, get up per rule 3, keep the light dim, do something boring, and go back only when sleepy. Keep your wake-up alarm exactly the same tomorrow, no matter how tonight goes.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha ilichukua muda zaidi ya kawaida kupata usingizi. Hilo hutokea, hasa wiki za mwanzo: mpango unafanya kazi hata kama usiku mmoja ni mgumu. Ukiwa macho kwa dakika 20 hivi, amka kulingana na kanuni ya 3, weka mwanga hafifu, fanya jambo la kuchosha, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia. Weka kengele yako ya kuamka sawasawa kesho, haijalishi usiku huu ulikuwaje.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha ilichukua muda zaidi ya kawaida kupata sleep. Hiyo inahappen, especially weeks za kwanza: mpango unafanya kazi hata kama usiku mmoja ni ngumu. Ukiwa umeamka kwa dakika 20, toka kulingana na rule 3, weka mwanga mdogo, fanya kitu boring, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia. Weka alarm yako ya kuamka sawa sawa kesho, haijalishi usiku huu ulikuwa aje.

fallback.en: Falling asleep quickly some nights and slowly on others is normal, especially while your body adjusts to the new window. Stick with your two alarms and your diary, and bring this up with your facilitator at the next session.
fallback.sw: Kupata usingizi haraka baadhi ya usiku na polepole siku zingine ni jambo la kawaida, hasa wakati mwili wako unazoea dirisha jipya. Endelea na kengele zako mbili na shajara yako, na uliza mwezeshaji wako kwenye kikao kijacho.
fallback.sheng: Kupata sleep haraka baadhi ya nights na polepole siku zingine ni kitu ya kawaida, especially wakati mwili wako unazoea window mpya. Endelea na alarm zako mbili na diary yako, na uulize facilitator wako next session.

prompt.en: I woke up in the night and could not fall back asleep
prompt.sw: Niliamka usiku na sikuweza kurudi kulala

response.en: Your diary shows a lot of time awake in the night, and you marked your sleeping space as part of what interfered. Session 3 has cheap fixes worth trying tonight: a kanga over the window for light, moving the sleeping mat away from noise if you can, and a cooler room rather than a hot one. If you are awake for about 20 minutes, still get up per rule 3 rather than lying there frustrated.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha muda mwingi wa kuwa macho usiku, na uliweka alama kuwa sehemu yako ya kulala ilikuwa sehemu ya kilichokusumbua. Kikao cha 3 kina masuluhisho ya bei nafuu ya kujaribu leo usiku: kuweka kanga dirishani kwa mwanga, kuhamisha mkeka wa kulala mbali na kelele ikiwezekana, na chumba baridi zaidi kuliko cha moto. Ukiwa macho kwa dakika 20 hivi, bado amka kulingana na kanuni ya 3 badala ya kulala hapo ukiwa umekasirika.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha muda mob umeamka usiku, na ulimark sehemu yako ya kulala kama part ya kilichokusumbua. Session 3 iko na cheap fixes za kutry leo usiku: kuweka kanga kwa window kwa mwanga, kuhamisha mkeka mbali na noise ikiwezekana, na room baridi zaidi kuliko moto. Ukiwa umeamka kwa dakika 20, bado toka kulingana na rule 3 badala ya kulala hapo ukiwa frustrated.

response.en: Your diary shows a lot of time awake during the night. This is exactly what rule 3 is for: if about 20 minutes pass and sleep has not returned, get up, keep the light dim, do something boring, and go back only when sleepy. Do not check the clock; turn it face down and let go instead.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha muda mwingi wa kuwa macho wakati wa usiku. Hii ndio kanuni ya 3 ilivyokusudiwa: dakika 20 hivi zikipita na usingizi haujarudi, amka, weka mwanga hafifu, fanya jambo la kuchosha, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia. Usiangalie saa; iweke chini na uachilie badala yake.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha muda mob umeamka during usiku. Hii ndio rule 3 ilikuwa ya hiyo: dakika 20 zikipita na sleep haijarudi, toka, weka mwanga mdogo, fanya kitu boring, na urudi tu ukiwa umesinzia. Usiangalie clock; iweke chini face down na uachilie badala yake.

fallback.en: Waking briefly in the night is normal and often goes unnoticed once sleep is more solid. Keep your diary going so your window can be adjusted if this continues.
fallback.sw: Kuamka kidogo usiku ni jambo la kawaida na mara nyingi haligundulikwi mara usingizi unapokuwa imara zaidi. Endelea na shajara yako ili dirisha lako lirekebishwe hili likiendelea.
fallback.sheng: Kuamka kidogo usiku ni kitu ya kawaida na mara nyingi haigundulikwi mara sleep inakuwa solid zaidi. Endelea na diary yako ili window yako iadjustwe hii ikiendelea.

prompt.en: I woke up too early and could not get back to sleep
prompt.sw: Niliamka mapema mno na sikuweza kurudi kulala
prompt.sheng: Niliamkia mapema sana sikuweza kurudi kulala

response.en: Your diary shows you woke up well before your usual time, and you marked worry as part of what disturbed you. Try moving tonight's worry time earlier in the evening so it is already dealt with before bed. Keep your wake-up time exactly as planned: getting up and into daylight, rather than lying there turning worries over, helps tonight's sleep debt build correctly.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha uliamka mapema mno kuliko kawaida yako, na uliweka alama kuwa wasiwasi ulikuwa sehemu ya kilichokusumbua. Jaribu kuhamisha muda wako wa kuwaza wasiwasi mapema jioni ili uwe umeshughulikiwa kabla ya kulala. Weka muda wako wa kuamka sawasawa kama ulivyopangwa: kuamka na kwenda kwenye mwanga wa mchana, badala ya kulala hapo ukiwaza wasiwasi, kunasaidia deni la usingizi la usiku huu kujengeka vizuri.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha uliamka mapema sana kuliko kawaida yako, na ulimark worry kama part ya kilichokusumbua. Try kuhamisha worry time yako mapema jioni ili iwe imeshughulikiwa kabla ya kulala. Weka wake time yako sawa sawa kama ulivyopanga: kuamka na kwenda kwa mwanga wa mchana, badala ya kulala hapo ukiwaza worry, inasaidia sleep debt ya usiku huu kujengeka vizuri.

response.en: Your diary shows you woke up well before your usual time this morning. Keep your wake-up time exactly as planned, even after a morning like this: staying in bed longer reopens the gap between time in bed and time asleep. If you are lying there awake, get up per rule 3 rather than dozing on and off.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha uliamka mapema mno kuliko kawaida yako asubuhi hii. Weka muda wako wa kuamka sawasawa kama ulivyopangwa, hata baada ya asubuhi kama hii: kukaa kitandani zaidi kunafungua tena pengo kati ya muda kitandani na muda wa kulala. Ukiwa umelala hapo ukiwa macho, amka kulingana na kanuni ya 3 badala ya kusinzia mara kwa mara.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha uliamka mapema sana kuliko kawaida yako asubuhi hii. Weka wake time yako sawa sawa kama ulivyopanga, hata baada ya asubuhi kama hii: kukaa bedani zaidi inafungua tena gap kati ya time in bed na time asleep. Ukiwa umelala hapo umeamka, toka kulingana na rule 3 badala ya kusinzia mara kwa mara.

fallback.en: Early waking that does not repeat every night is common while your body adjusts to the new window, especially in the first couple of weeks. If you are lying there awake, get up per rule 3 rather than dozing on and off. If this keeps happening for several nights in a row, mention it to your facilitator; the weekly window review takes it into account.
fallback.sw: Kuamka mapema ambako hakujirudia kila usiku ni jambo la kawaida wakati mwili wako unazoea dirisha jipya, hasa wiki za kwanza. Ukiwa umelala hapo ukiwa macho, amka kulingana na kanuni ya 3 badala ya kusinzia mara kwa mara. Likiendelea kwa usiku kadhaa mfululizo, mwambie mwezeshaji wako; mapitio ya kila wiki ya dirisha yanazingatia hili.
fallback.sheng: Kuamkia mapema ambayo haijirudii kila usiku ni kitu ya kawaida wakati mwili wako unazoea window mpya, especially weeks za kwanza. Ukiwa umelala hapo umeamka, toka kulingana na rule 3 badala ya kusinzia mara kwa mara. Ikiendelea kwa nights kadhaa mfululizo, mwambie facilitator wako; weekly window review inazingatia hii.

prompt.en: I feel very sleepy during the day

response.en: Feeling this sleepy in the day is expected in the first week or two of a shorter window: it means the plan is building sleep debt. Get sunlight and move your body during the day, but not naps, since a nap spends the sleep debt tonight needs. This should ease as your window opens back up.
response.sw: Kusinzia hivi mchana kunatarajiwa katika wiki ya kwanza au ya pili ya dirisha fupi: inamaanisha mpango unajenga deni la usingizi. Pata jua na sogeza mwili wako mchana, lakini si kulala mchana, kwa sababu kulala mchana kunatumia deni la usingizi ambalo usiku unahitaji. Hili linapaswa kupungua dirisha lako linapoanza kufunguka tena.
response.sheng: Ku-feel sleepy hivi mchana ni expected kwa week ya kwanza ama ya pili ya window fupi: inamaanisha mpango unabuild sleep debt. Pata jua na move mwili wako mchana, lakini sio kulala mchana, kwa sababu kulala mchana inatumia sleep debt ambayo usiku unahitaji. Hii inapaswa kupungua window yako ikianza kufunguka tena.

response.en: Your diary shows you napped. A daytime nap spends part of the sleep debt your window is building, which can make tonight harder rather than easier. If you feel very sleepy today, try a short walk, sunlight, or talking with someone instead, and save rest for your prescribed window tonight.
response.sw: Shajara yako inaonyesha ulilala mchana. Kulala mchana kunatumia sehemu ya deni la usingizi ambalo dirisha lako linajenga, jambo linaloweza kufanya usiku huu kuwa mgumu zaidi badala ya rahisi. Ukisinzia sana leo, jaribu kutembea kidogo, kupata jua, au kuzungumza na mtu badala yake, na hifadhi kupumzika kwa dirisha lako lililopangwa usiku huu.
response.sheng: Diary yako inaonyesha ulilala mchana. Kulala mchana inatumia part ya sleep debt ambayo window yako inabuild, kitu ambacho kinaweza kufanya usiku huu kuwa ngumu zaidi badala ya rahisi. Ukisinzia sana leo, try kutembea kidogo, kupata jua, ama kuongea na mtu badala yake, na weka rest kwa window yako iliyopangwa usiku huu.

fallback.en: Some daytime sleepiness is normal while your window is short. It should ease within a week or two as your window grows. If it does not, or if it ever puts your safety at risk, tell your facilitator right away.
fallback.sw: Kusinzia kidogo mchana ni jambo la kawaida wakati dirisha lako ni fupi. Linapaswa kupungua ndani ya wiki moja au mbili dirisha lako linavyokua. Kama halipungui, au likiwahi kuweka usalama wako hatarini, mwambie mwezeshaji wako mara moja.
fallback.sheng: Kusinzia kidogo mchana ni kitu ya kawaida wakati window yako iko fupi. Inapaswa kupungua ndani ya week moja ama mbili window yako ikikua. Kama haipungui, ama ikiwahi kuweka usalama wako hatarini, mwambie facilitator wako mara moja.

prompt.en: I want to give up, this is too hard
prompt.sw: Nataka kuacha, hii ni ngumu mno
prompt.sheng: Nataka kuacha, hii ni ngumu sana

fallback.en: The first nights on a shorter window are the hardest part of the whole program, on purpose: that is what builds the sleep debt your body needs. It gets easier from here, not harder. Remember the wake-up and bedtime you committed to in session 1, and if you are struggling, tell your facilitator: the window can be reviewed sooner than the next scheduled session if you need that.
fallback.sw: Usiku za kwanza za dirisha fupi ndio sehemu ngumu zaidi ya programu nzima, kwa makusudi: hilo ndilo linalojenga deni la usingizi ambalo mwili wako unahitaji. Kutoka hapa, inakuwa rahisi zaidi, si ngumu zaidi. Kumbuka muda wa kuamka na wa kulala ulioahidi kwenye kikao cha kwanza, na kama unapambana, mwambie mwezeshaji wako: dirisha linaweza kupitiwa mapema kuliko kikao kilichopangwa ukihitaji hivyo.
fallback.sheng: Nights za kwanza za window fupi ndio part ngumu zaidi ya program mzima, on purpose: ndio inabuild ile sleep debt ambayo mwili wako inahitaji. Kutoka hapa, inakuwa rahisi zaidi, si ngumu zaidi. Kumbuka wake time na bedtime uliokubali kwa session ya kwanza, na kama unastruggle, mwambie facilitator wako: window inaweza kureviewiwa mapema kuliko session iliyopangwa ukihitaji hivyo.

prompt.en: Someone else needs to sleep in the same room or bed
prompt.sw: Mtu mwingine anahitaji kulala chumba au kitanda kimoja
prompt.sheng: Mtu mwingine anahitaji kulala room ama bed moja

fallback.en: Many people in this program share one room, or the bed itself, and there is no single perfect answer, only what works in your home. When you need to get up per rule 3, try sitting on the edge of the bed or a stool, using a corner with a chair and a shuka set up before bed, or stepping just outside the door if it is safe. Plan your spot ahead of time, before you need it.
fallback.sw: Watu wengi katika programu hii wanashiriki chumba kimoja, au kitanda chenyewe, na hakuna jibu moja kamili, ni tu kile kinachofanya kazi nyumbani kwako. Unapohitaji kuamka kulingana na kanuni ya 3, jaribu kukaa ukingoni mwa kitanda au kwenye kigoda, kutumia kona yenye kiti na shuka iliyowekwa tayari kabla ya kulala, au kutoka nje ya mlango kidogo ikiwa ni salama. Panga mahali pako mapema, kabla hujahitaji.
fallback.sheng: Watu wengi kwa program hii wanashare room moja, ama bed yenyewe, na hakuna jibu moja perfect, ni tu ile inafanya kazi kwa home yako. Ukihitaji kutoka kulingana na rule 3, try kukaa edge ya bed ama kwa stool, kutumia corner na kiti na shuka imewekwa tayari kabla ya kulala, ama kutoka nje kidogo ya mlango kama iko safe. Panga spot yako mapema, kabla hujaihitaji.

prompt.en: I snore loudly, or someone says I stop breathing while asleep
prompt.sw: Ninakoroma sana, au mtu anasema ninaacha kupumua nikiwa nimelala
prompt.sheng: Ninasnore sana, ama mtu anasema ninaacha kupumua nikiwa nimelala

fallback.en: Thank you for telling us. This needs a different kind of care than this program gives, so we are showing you where to go next.
fallback.sw: Asante kwa kutuambia. Hili linahitaji aina tofauti ya matunzo kuliko ile programu hii inatoa, hivyo tunakuonyesha wapi pa kwenda sasa.
fallback.sheng: Asante kwa kutuambia. Hii inahitaji aina tofauti ya care kuliko ile program hii inatoa, kwa hivyo tunakuonyesha wapi pa kwenda sasa.
